2018-T3-P1-S4.trunk: 强调句：It is against that background that … Denham … has issued her damning verdict …（正是在此背景下，信息专员丹纳姆…作出严厉裁定）
structure: 强调句：It is against that background that …（强调状语 against that background）
被强调后的主句：the information commissioner, Elizabeth Denham, has issued her damning verdict against the Royal Free hospital trust under the NHS
└ 非限制性定语从句〔which，修饰 the trust〕：which handed over to DeepMind the records of 1.6 million patients in 2015 on the basis of a vague agreement
└ 定语从句〔which，修饰 a vague agreement〕：which took far too little account of the patients' rights and their expectations of privacy
2018-T3-P1-S4.logic: It is … that … 强调句（强调 against that background）；主句 commissioner has issued verdict；第一个 which 定语从句修饰 trust；其内再套第二个 which 定语从句修饰 agreement。
notes: It is against that background that…：强调句（强调状语；删 It is…that 后句子仍成立）。
第一个 which 非限制定语从句修饰 trust（它把…记录移交 DeepMind）；第二个 which 定语从句修饰 a vague agreement。
take far too little account of…：太少顾及…；Elizabeth Denham 是 commissioner 的同位语。

2018-T3-P2-S3.trunk: S+V(被动)：Further arrangements … will be carefully scrutinised（NHS 与 DeepMind 之间今后的安排将受到仔细审查）
structure: 主句：Further arrangements … between the NHS and DeepMind will be carefully scrutinised
├ 破折号插入：and there may be many
├ 介词短语作定语〔修饰 arrangements〕：between the NHS and DeepMind
└ 不定式作目的：to ensure that all necessary permissions have been asked of patients and all unnecessary data has been cleaned
└ 并列宾语从句(that)：all necessary permissions have been asked … and all unnecessary data has been cleaned
2018-T3-P2-S3.logic: 主语 arrangements（破折号插入 and there may be many + between… 定语，造成主谓分隔），谓语 will be scrutinised（被动）；to ensure that…（目的 + 并列宾语从句，均现在完成被动）。
notes: 主谓分隔：主语 Further arrangements 与谓语 will be carefully scrutinised 被破折号插入（and there may be many）与 between… 隔开。
to ensure that … and …：不定式作目的，that 引导并列宾语从句（两项均为现在完成被动）。
permissions have been asked of patients：ask sth of sb 的被动（已向患者征得许可）。

2018-T3-P4-S5.trunk: 条件+主句：If software promises to save lives …, big data may be expected to behave as big pharma has done
structure: 条件状语从句(If)：If software promises to save lives on the scale that drugs now can
└ 定语从句〔that，修饰 the scale〕：that drugs now can〔句末省略 save〕
主句：big data may be expected to behave as big pharma has done
├ be expected to do：被动（可望/被期待）
└ 方式状语从句(as)：as big pharma has done〔done 替代 behaved〕
2018-T3-P4-S5.logic: If 条件从句（that 定语从句修饰 the scale，句末省略 save）；主句 big data may be expected to behave（被动）；as big pharma has done 方式状语从句（如同大药厂那样）。
notes: on the scale that drugs now can：that 定语从句修饰 the scale，句末省略 save（达到如今药物所能拯救的规模）。
be expected to do：被动（可望/被期待）。
as big pharma has done：as 方式状语从句（如同大型制药业已做的那样），done 替代 behaved。
